title: Liam Harrison (rugby league)
extract: Liam Harrison (born 13 December 1983) is a former professional rugby league and rugby union footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s. He played representative level rugby league (RL) for Ireland and Cumbria, and at club level for Barrow Island ARLFC (in Barrow Island, Barrow-in-Furness) and Barrow Raiders, with whom he spent his whole professional rugby league career, as a wing, centre, second-row or loose forward, and club level rugby union (RU) for North Walsham R.F.C. (in North Walsham, Norfolk).
